zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏弱，关注80美元支撑
zh.content:
SOL/USD当前维持窄幅震荡，价格运行在81美元附近，24小时波动有限，显示市场观望情绪较浓。从结构看，价格仍处于短线弱势整理阶段，未能有效突破上方均线压制，多头动能暂时不足。

技术指标方面，MACD维持在零轴下方，且数值为负，说明空头力量仍占一定优势，短线可能继续反复震荡。20日均线位于81.82附近，当前价格低于均线，意味着趋势偏空，若无法重新站稳，回调风险仍在。

关键支撑位首先关注80.40区域，该位置接近日内低点，若跌破可能进一步下探79美元一线。上方阻力则集中在81.80至82.20区间，只有放量突破该区域，才有机会打开新的反弹空间。

交易策略上，激进交易者可关注80.40附近的短线低吸机会，但需严格设置止损。稳健型投资者建议等待价格重新站稳20日均线后再考虑顺势做多。目前整体更适合区间交易，不宜盲目追涨。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading in a relatively narrow range near 81.02, reflecting cautious market participation after recent downside pressure. Price action remains slightly below the 20-period simple moving average at 81.819, suggesting the short-term trend is still mildly bearish despite the modest 0.35% daily gain. The inability to break decisively above the moving average indicates sellers are still active near resistance zones, while buyers appear willing to defend the lower 80 region.

Momentum indicators currently favor a conservative outlook. The MACD value at -0.747 shows bearish momentum remains present, even though downside pressure may be slowing. With the signal line unavailable, confirmation of a reversal is limited, making traders dependent on price structure and volume behavior for direction. RSI data is also unavailable, reducing visibility into overbought or oversold conditions. Even so, the market’s compressed trading range often precedes a stronger directional move once volatility expands.

Immediate support appears around 80.45-80.50, closely aligned with the session low. A sustained break below that level could expose additional downside toward the psychological 79.50 area. On the upside, resistance is forming near 81.80-82.00, where the SMA(20) and recent rejection levels converge. If bulls manage to reclaim and hold above 82.00, short-term sentiment could improve significantly, potentially opening the path toward 83.50 in the near term.

Short-term traders may consider range-based strategies while the market remains compressed, buying near support and reducing exposure close to resistance. More cautious participants may prefer waiting for a confirmed breakout above 82.00 or a breakdown below 80.40 before entering directional positions. Risk management remains essential, as weak momentum signals and low volatility conditions can quickly transition into sharp price swings in the cryptocurrency market.
